feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to activate Scope item's in Test System
entry.content:
We are unable to proceed with the activation of scope item's in the test system?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Group Reporting - Version Restrictions
entry.content:
How can I restrict access to a specific consolidation version? For example, version A10. I am asking about the best practices that SAP recommends.

We are trying to restrict the A10 versión through  all consolidation business roles.

entry.title: You have to add the Supplier role (FLVN00) to Employment BP
entry.content:
I wanted to create an employee as a supplier, but I get the following message when I select BP role supplier (fin. accounting).

You have to add the Supplier role (FLVN00) to Employment BP


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Open Posting Periods for Specific Ledgers Only
entry.content:
There is a requirement from the business to open 2L, 3L, and P2 ledgers only (not 0L) for specific company codes. The configuration Assign Fiscal Year Variants to Ledgers and Company Codes allow saving of different PPV (with different ledgers) for one company code. Please confirm if this setup is feasible.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Verify Journal Entries submission screen not showing tax data
entry.content:
When creating a journal entry via FIORI app: Verify General Journal Entries - for Requestor and submit it to the workflow, the display of the journal does not provide the tax line & tax information, which was entered during the journal creation.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Enforce whole numbers only for Quantity in Unit of entry in Goods Post
entry.content:
Hello community, I was wondering if there is a way to enforce so that only whole numbers can be used in the quantity in Unit of entry field for the Goods Post for S4HANA Cloud Public. I tried setting the Decimal Places to 0  and the Decimal Rounding to 2 as the image shows but it only worked for the PO quantity not for the quantity in the Goods Post. 

Any help is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Sales Order auto close in public cloud
entry.content:
It is required to auto close open sales order for more than 7 days in public cloud.

We are unable to find a BAPI or standard possible route.

Kidnly suggest how we can Autoclose open orders in Public cloud.

entry.title: Duplicate Reference Check Invoice Number MIRO & Create Incoming Invoice.
entry.content:
We have activated the “Check Double Invoice” option in the supplier master to prevent duplicate reference numbers during MIRO posting and incoming invoice creation.

However, after posting one MIRO document with reference number 123456, the system is still allowing us to post another MIRO document with the same reference number.

Kindly guide us on how to change this duplicate reference check from a warning message to an error message, so that the system does not allow posting with the same reference number again.

entry.title: Inspection Lot Quantity field's value is not printing in Quality Certificate
entry.content:
We have developed a Quality Certificate for batches and mapped the Inspection Lot Quantity field using binding. Previously, the field value was printed successfully. However, for the past 3 to 4 months, we have observed that the Inspection Lot Quantity field value is no longer printing in the Quality Certificate for batches.

A similar issue occurred with the Inspection Date field. Therefore, we created a support case with SAP. After analyzing the Quality Certificate form, SAP proposed a solution to correct the binding and add the field logic in BADI QM_QCERTIFICATE_OUT_MODIFY.

After implementing the suggested changes, the Inspection Date field is now printing successfully. However, the Inspection Lot Quantity field value is still not printing.

We have tried multiple combinations and approaches, but we are still unable to print the Inspection Lot Quantity field value.

Could anyone please help us resolve this issue?

entry.title: How in SAP S/4 HANA public cloud legal requirement for threshold based tax rates
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone explain how in public cloud Tax rates is managed as per threshold based on the 2025/2026 as one product with different rates as per threshold, below are the examples

1. Apparel and Clothing
5% GST: Applied to clothing with a sale value of up to Rs. 2,500 per piece.
12% or Higher: Apparel priced above this threshold generally attracts higher rates (formerly 12%, but moving towards 18% in the new 2025 framework for high-value items). 

2. Footwear
5% GST: Applied to footwear with a Retail Sale Price (RSP) not exceeding Rs. 500 per pair.
18% GST: Applied to footwear with a sale value exceeding Rs. 500 per pair. 

3. Footwear & Ready-made Garments (General Value Rule)
As per CBIC guidelines, readymade garments with a transaction value up to Rs. 1,000 per piece attract 5% GST, while those above Rs. 1,000 attract 12%. 

4. Luxury and High-Value Items (40% Slab)
Under the new GST 2.0 regime effective from September 22, 2025, a high-value threshold (e.g., luxury cars, premium motorcycles over 350cc) triggers the最高 (highest) tax slab of 40%, replacing the previous 28% + cess structure

Kindly help

entry.title: Add Attachment to ouptut in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Is there any possibility to add Attachment to the output of a Sales Quotation?

We are using the app "Manage Sales Quotation" - > Create Quotation -> Click on Service for Object -> Create Attachment

In other apps, like manage purchase orders, there is a possibility to add attachments as external documents and then they appear also in the output. 

BR
Mona

entry.title: Naming/Set up company code ID
entry.content:
Dear Community,

since last year SAP changed the logic regarding company code ID from numerical to alphernumeric.

Meaning Company Code set up from 1010 to 10DE for e.g.

Based on our experience this logic is not aligned within the whole SAP landscape, meaning within the Starter System for e.g. alphernumeric (10DE) is mandatory but within the Customer System it was still possible to go ahead with the old logic (1010)

Has this already been aligned or is it still the case, that both ways for company code set up are possible?

The only reference we found at SAP about this topic is from 2024:

3378323 - Naming Convention of Company Codes - SAP for Me

Thx & BR

Marcel

entry.title: CK2027 Error When Marking Standard Cost Estimates in F1865 - Organizational Measure Not Allowed for
entry.content:
## Issue Description

**Error Message:** CK2027
**Error Text:**
> "In Legal Valuation the following occurred: You are trying to mark materials for period 002/2026 and company code 1510 in ledger 0L, although marking has not been allowed for this."

**System:** SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
**App Used:** F1865 - Manage Costing Runs - Estimated Costs
**Step Failed:** Marking step in costing run execution
**Business Context:** Standard cost estimate marking for period 002/2026

---

## Root Cause

The organizational measure (organizational standard) has not been enabled for **marking standard cost estimates** for the following combination:
- Company Code: 1510
- Ledger: 0L (Leading Ledger)
- Period: 002/2026
- Valuation Type: Legal Valuation

---

## Solution

### Step 1: Navigate to Organizational Standards App

**App ID to search:** Look for organizational standards/measures app (likely something like F2XXX or similar)

**Search terms in SAP Fiori Launchpad:**
- "Organizational Standards"
- "Organizational Measure"
- "Manage Organizational Standards"
- "組織標準"

### Step 2: Access the Configuration

Once in the app:

1. Filter/navigate to:
- Company Code: **1510**
- Ledger: **0L**
- Fiscal Year/Period: **002/2026**

2. Look for settings related to **Product Costing** or **Material Price Determination**

### Step 3: Enable Marking Permission

1. Click on **Company Code** or **Valuation View** in the list
2. You'll either see:
- Permitted costing variants (if already enabled), OR
- A request/button to enable organizational measure
3. Enable marking for your **Costing Variant** used in the costing run
4. Ensure **"Allow Marking"** is checked for period 002/2026
5. Save

### Step 4: Retry in F1865

1. Go back to **F1865 - Manage Costing Runs - Estimated Costs**
2. Select your costing run
3. Re-execute the **Marking** step

Error should be resolved.

---

## Additional Info Needed

**Question:** What is the exact Fiori App ID for managing organizational standards in your system? (So I can give you the exact app to use)

entry.title: Bank statement: Ignore partner information for batch payments
entry.content:
Hello! I tried to change the income bank statement format data. We have the following problem: In our account statement the column ns1:NbOfTxs is sometimes filled with a recurring number, when there are batch payments. For these payments, where we have the details in the file - but we do not want to use them. At the moment the name and the bank account of the last payment in the batch is used for the whole batch.

To solve this problem, i wanted to add a condition --> if ns1:NbOfTxs <> 1, ignore partner bank account and name.
But the line "Set creditor IBAN" already has a condition. Is it possible to add another condition? Or do you see any other possibility to solve this issue?

entry.title: "change purchase order" app automatically pulls a PO when opened
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

When we open the Change Purchase Order app, the system automatically opens a previously accessed PO. Normally, the app should open with an empty screen prompting the user to enter a PO number.

Please help confirm if this is expected behavior or advise how this can be cleared.

Thank You

entry.title: Quantity Field is Blank for Journal Entry Type RE
entry.content:
In the general ledger line item display for RE-type documents, the quantity field is missing for the GR/IR (goods receipt/invoice receipt) clearing account.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud, on AVC Need to derive BOM quantity based on characteristic calculation
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Hello,

I am working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using Advanced Variant Configuration (AVC).

Business requirement:
The finished product has a numeric characteristic Z_LONGITUD (unit: M).
This value should determine the component quantity of a cable material in the BOM (unit of measure: M), so that:

Configured Length → Component Quantity in BOM → Correct MRP Planning

What I have tried:

  • Set the BOM item category to Variable-Size Item (R)

  • Defined one size dimension (Length, unit M)

  • Created a formula key (e.g. ROMS1)

  • Attempted to assign ROMS1 = $ROOT.Z_LONGITUD in a procedure dependency → syntax error

  • Attempted to use constraint logic to influence quantity → not allowed

  • Variable-size item does not seem to allow direct mapping to a configurable characteristic in this tenant

Question:

Is it technically supported in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition to dynamically derive the BOM component quantity from a configurable characteristic (numeric, continuous value)?

If yes:

  • What is the correct modeling approach?

  • Should this be done via Variable-Size Item reference characteristic?

  • Is Quantity Formula supported?

If not

  • It is side-by-side extensibility (BTP) required?

The goal is to ensure correct MRP planning based on the configured length.

Any guidance or best practice would be appreciated.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Record quantity indicator in center cost
entry.content:
Hi gurus, 

I am researching the field record quantity in cost center and the time to perform tests with a cost center that has the flag marked and unmarked, and I cannot find any differences in the postings, so based on my research, I should at least get a warning about the amount...

Is there any information about this field or how it works? I haven't been able to find any useful information on the help portal or by searching the community...

Best regards and thank you.

entry.title: PR/PO Flexible Workflow gets stuck (SAP_WFRT)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'd like to request some guidence related to workflow approvals in S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

We’re on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition with a customer using scope item BDK.

Flow: External system creates Sales Order → system creates Purchase Requisition → Purchase Order (Standard job) → a follow-up job creates Supplier Invoice and Billing Document (Custom jobs).

Problem: PR/PO flexible workflow / automatic approval is active in the tenant. If we deactivate it, some required custom logic stops working, so we must keep workflow active.

However, we frequently see workflow runtime issues where SAP_WFRT appears as processing user and the workflow instance becomes stuck/errored, which stops PR or PO processing and blocks the whole integration chain. If we go to Flexible Workflow Administration and Resume the workflow, everything continues normally. We've noticed that this happens mostly with sales orders with more than 2 items. We currently need the PR to PO conversion job (standard) to be per  item, meaning that if a PR has 3 items the standard job will create 3 PO´s and one of those usually gets stuck with the following error:

Then we need to manually resume the workflow for the whole process flow to work.

It's important to mention that we are currently using dev/cust and test environments.

Customer expects thousands of orders/day, so manual resume is not scalable/viable.

Questions:

  1. Is there a known root cause / fix for PR/PO workflows getting stuck with SAP_WFRT in Public Cloud?

  2. Is there any supported way to automate recovery, e.g., a scheduled job/template/API to detect + resume stuck workflow instances?

  3. If auto-resume isn’t supported, what’s SAP’s recommended approach for high-volume integration to avoid integration stoppage (monitoring/alerts/config patterns)?

Any pointers (SAP Notes/KBAs, configuration checks, best practices) would help.

 

Thank you in advance,

entry.title: CK2027 Error When Marking Standard Cost Estimates in F1865 - How to Resolve "Marking Not Allowed for
entry.content:
## CK2027 Error When Marking Standard Cost Estimates in F1865 - How to Resolve "Marking Not Allowed for Period 002/2026"?

---

### Issue Description

**Error Message:** CK2027
**Error Text:**
> "In Legal Valuation the following occurred: You are trying to mark materials for period 002/2026 and company code 1510 in ledger 0L, although marking has not been allowed for this."

**System:** SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
**App Used:** F1865 - Manage Costing Runs - Estimated Costs
**Step Failed:** Marking step in costing run execution

When I try to execute the **Marking** step in my costing run, I receive error CK2027 stating that marking is not allowed for period 002/2026 in company code 1510, ledger 0L.

---

### Questions

1. **How can I resolve this CK2027 error?** What are the exact step-by-step instructions to fix this issue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

2. **Which Fiori App(s) do I need to use** to allow marking for:
- Company Code: 1510
- Ledger: 0L
- Period: 002/2026
- Valuation Type: Legal Valuation

3. **What specific settings or configurations need to be changed** to enable marking permission for this period?

---

### What I've Tried

- Searched for apps with keywords "Organizational Standards" and "Organizational Measure" but couldn't find the right app
- The error message mentions "organizational measure" but I don't know which app to use in Cloud Public Edition

---

### Environment

- SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
- Release: [your release version]
- Scope Item: Standard Costing (BEG_JP or 3F0)

---

Any help would be greatly appreciated!
